name: @pryzm/entitlements
description: A.18 + A.18.b (Phase A · Sprint 2) — L2 pure entitlements resolver per C39.  Maps `EntitlementKey` → required plan tier; resolves `(key, billingState) → { allowed, requiredTier?, reason? }`.  Append-only registry per C39 §1.2; deprecated entries return `allowed: true` per the soft-retire convention.  Pure: no I/O, no Stripe, no auth.  The L5 entitlements slot in `apps/editor` wraps this with the live BillingState + role check.  Pricing-page generator (`apps/docs-site/src/pricing.tsx`) reads the registry at build time per C39 §1.13.
